channel.title: Eratosthenes on Maya Sarangan
channel.description: Recent content in Eratosthenes on Maya Sarangan

item.title: How to Measure a Building Without Touching It
item.description: I have this big hole on my face called my mouth… and I probably should have kept it shut. One day, I peeked ahead in my math book and saw a chapter on trigonometry. Out of curiosity, I asked my dad what it meant… and that’s when things got interesting. My dad explained the basics and asked me a question. How would you try and find the height of the building?
